name: caido
title: caido
description:
security auditing toolkit (desktop)
This package contains caido desktop, a security auditing toolkit.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use caido because security auditing toolkit (desktop).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use caido as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `caido [options] [args]` as documented upstream for caido.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair caido with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `caido --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
